records.ety: [OE. moder, AS. mōdor; akin to D. moeder, OS. mōdar, G. mutter, OHG. muotar, Icel. mōðir, Dan. & Sw. moder, OSlav. mati, Russ. mate, Ir. & Gael. mathair, L. mater, Gr. mh`thr, Skr. māt; cf. Skr. mā to measure. √268. Cf. Material, Matrix, Metropolis, Father.]

defs: A female parent; especially, one of the human race; a woman who has borne a child.
That which has produced or nurtured anything; source of birth or origin; generatrix.
quotes: Alas! poor country! . . . it can not Be called our mother, but our grave.
I behold . . . the solitary majesty of Crete, mother of a religion, it is said, that lived two thousand years.

defs: The female superior or head of a religious house, as an abbess, etc.
Received by birth or from ancestors; native, natural; as, mother language; also acting the part, or having the place of a mother; producing others; originating.
quotes: It is the mother falsehood from which all idolatry is derived.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Mothered (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Mothering.]

defs: To adopt as a son or daughter; to perform the duties of a mother to.
quotes: The queen, to have put lady Elizabeth besides the crown, would have mothered another body's child.

records.ety: [Akin to D. modder mud, G. moder mold, mud, Dan. mudder mud, and to E. mud. See Mud.]

defs: A film or membrane which is developed on the surface of fermented alcoholic liquids, such as vinegar, wine, etc., and acts as a means of conveying the oxygen of the air to the alcohol and other combustible principles of the liquid, thus leading to their oxidation.
notes: ☞ The film is composed of a mass of rapidly developing microorganisms of the genus Mycoderma, and in the mother of vinegar the microorganisms (Mycoderma aceti) composing the film are the active agents in the Conversion of the alcohol into vinegar. When thickened by growth, the film may settle to the bottom of the fluid. See Acetous fermentation, under Fermentation.

defs: To become like, or full of, mother, or thick matter, as vinegar.
A person or thing with some exceptional quality, as great size or power; as, a grizzly stuck his nose in my tent and I grabbed my pistol and shot the mother.
